info.title: Unknown
info.description: Trigger command when a watched resource (e.g. Clipboard, Filesystem, Http, Ftp, etc) changes.

commands.name: Arguments
commands.description: Arguments passed to program when Clipboard is updated.

commands.name: Interval
commands.description:
Interval in which to poll clipboard in ms
[Default='500']
TargetProgram* (-t)   The target program that is triggered

commands.name: Repeat
commands.description:
Number of times to repeat watch and trigger. 0 is
indefinitely [Default='0']
